coder: tools/quadindex/coder.mjs (shared judge conventions: A→0 B→(1,0), Cx+Dx≤1 fold, no mirror, codeTol 0.015)

schema.stars: ra_deg:f64, dec_deg:f64, g_mag:f32, source_id:u64 (Arrow IPC file, single batch)
schema.band: code0..3:f32(dimensionless), star0..3:u32(row into stars.arrow), diam_deg:f32, code_key:i32 — Arrow IPC file, batched by batchRows, sorted by code_key asc
schema.ipc: Arrow IPC file-format, little-endian, no validity buffers (null_count 0)
schema.compression: NONE (apache-arrow JS 21 writer has no in-format buffer compression; documented deviation — NEVER .gz-around per owner ruling)
